CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '巡店'), Store_Inspection_Number_Summary__c / Number__c , IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '客户拜访'), Customer_Visit_Summary__c/ Number__c , IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '渠道拓展'), Customer_Extend_Summary__c/ Number__c , IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '销售额'), Daily_Sales_Summary__c / Sales__c , 0))))
CustomField.label: Rate of Completion
